raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1; applying gentle lateral contact will not shift the stacked assembly off the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, reducing motion while box_1 is being separated and lifted."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms have clear access to the left and right faces of box_1; box_2 is stabilized; sufficient vertical clearance exists above box_1 to lift without scraping the table or contacting box_2 given the attached interface.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely clamped between both end-effectors and lifted slightly, breaking/overcoming the attachment to box_2 while box_2 remains on the table."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1; applying gentle lateral contact will not shift the stacked assembly off the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, reducing motion while box_1 is being separated and lifted.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms have clear access to the left and right faces of box_1; box_2 is stabilized; sufficient vertical clearance exists above box_1 to lift without scraping the table or contacting box_2 given the attached interface.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely clamped between both end-effectors and lifted slightly, breaking/overcoming the attachment to box_2 while box_2 remains on the table.
